---
title: "Sir Edward Antrobus 2nd Bt."
---

## Sir Edward Antrobus 2nd Bt.

**Dates:** (1792-4 May 1870)

### Description

landowner

### Biography

He succeeded his uncle by special remainder, 1826, and was succeeded by his son and namesake (1818-1899).

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 14th [1852]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
